{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122650BC19880C5F76F1ABBDAB"}"},"total":190},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7555121155562423102","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的书啊！潜力股！第一人称，不明确表明主角年龄、性别等的设定很有代入感哎！剧情也很有趣，让人有想读下去的欲望。剧情刀刀的，很安心（安详倒地）
不过还是有点小小的遗憾…最开始以为主角的能力是变成幽灵，当时真的好期待，虽然最后不是…哦不！
大大考不考虑这本写完之后再写一本主角能力是变幽灵的书～死亡可以实现从实体到幽灵的转换之类的设定，感觉好棒！（或者我自己去写…嘶，我写的完吗…）
还有白石！怎么就死掉了（爆哭），还被蠢蛋前首领掘了坟墓，气死我了，杀千刀的首领！
目前差不多就这样了…总之，大大加油！期待后面剧情！～(￣▽￣～)~","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":10,"text":"第一人称","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%BA%E7%A7%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774067210F1ABBDAB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227555121155562423102%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227533606997904608318%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%BA%E7%A7%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759065951,"group_id":"7533606997904608318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢蜜蜂的蜜蜂大王不吃蜜蜂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2OYbG3DuWCcoPjeaJ+sgK0IAwTlvw7T87aipa1sNZYM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/404279a4f8a44734949ac47891fc4479~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615463&x-signature=PhCOLcgEzHeybzFQfiv%2F4D7hH2k%3D","user_id":"4095045445629763","user_name":"落灀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4095045445629763","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533606997904608318","book_info":{"abstract":"（排雷：视角为第一人称   全员cb向  无性别主角 可能是先苦后甜？文章很痛  不喜勿进  ）
目前正文是灰色中立线（半个黑手党线）ing
一个普通人在穿越后会发生什么？
金手指？NO。
系统？NO。
自带语音包？NO。
哦，也对。毕竟我没有撞大运。
怎么还不可视！？
这不对吧？穿越文里不是这样的吧？不应该给我超强能力碾压全场吗？
如果非要说的话，我在第一次死亡后获得了异能「死既生」
有意思 这么厉害的名字一定很强吧 buff叠这么满
什么叫用异能别人会忘了我？什么叫我会失去记忆？！
我到底会活成什么样啊…又会遇到什么人啊


（天人五衰 纯黑线 未解锁

今天上番茄一看评分直接7.1了 真的给我震惊到了 作者的文笔非常好 内容有逻辑 而且绝对不“刀” 每个角色在他的手下都变得栩栩如生 可以说你读下来是非常舒服的 从这本书刚写时我就在追了作者大大非常听取粉丝意见 想听粉丝对主角的评价真的是一步一步看着她过来的 在这里恭喜作者评分7.1啦相信不久的将来它得评分会更多会爆火！加油！","text_exts":[{"e":69,"s":65,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774067210F1ABBDAB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227543673322044392254%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227533606997904608318%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756400781,"group_id":"7533606997904608318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N97uI+ky4IFyjJVnWWsP1x0SB0eT0JdJ6/zzWRXnlBBe","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/26d9e809965d4044b20cbc08a08abd44~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620950&x-signature=6O4Tyzuq4zVGU%2FeoeG64f2ePPz4%3D","user_id":"2427351446073495","user_name":"小Z啦啦啦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2427351446073495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533606997904608318","book_info":{"abstract":"（排雷：视角为第一人称 _count":0,"listen_duration":5293,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7781,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1936},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1756418747,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7554436364075746110","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看但不知道为什么不火，代入感很强，文笔也很棒啊，主角的性格我也好喜欢，经历有那么亿点点惨可是我是bt我就喜欢吃刀子（吐血）里面的配角也描写的很真实，真实到我因为里面的情感破防了好几次[哭][哭][哭]但就是眼睁睁看着它凉下来了，我一直在试图挽救一下，学生党没钱就签到领金币，希望作者大大加油，真的真的很好看！[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758906195,"group_id":"7533606997904608318","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"老天爷我要变成攻了，因为我受不了了！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/NAkisj+bEi7s4A2R0QjpkYjG0y2C5S1HRkEJ40ZWz2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c406a477c3214b66b043e9f9db823768~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616196&x-signature=%2B4cP%2F%2FIX0k0TVprTdyt8j%2BCdz3E%3D","user_id":"1176920185379051","user_name":"阳光开朗大黑瞎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1176920185379051","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533606997904608318","book_info":{"abstract":"（排雷：视角为第一人称
